semantic_description: Computes the length of the longest contiguous strictly increasing run in an integer array. For n = 0 it returns 0 without entering the loop; otherwise it scans a[1..n-1] with a for loop, maintaining cur as the length of the current increasing suffix ending at the previous/current element and best as the maximum run length seen so far. The function reads but does not modify the input array, and the postcondition preserves IntArray::full(a, n, l).
